en: And the high priest said, "Are these things so?"
zh: 大祭司說：“真有這些事嗎？”

en: And Stephen said: "Brothers and fathers, hear me. The God of glory appeared to our father Abraham when he was in Mesopotamia, before he lived in Haran,
zh: 司提反說：“各位父老兄弟請聽！我們的祖宗亞伯拉罕，在美索不達米亞，還沒有住在哈蘭的時候，榮耀的 神向他顯現，

en: and said to him, 'Go out from your land and from your kindred and go into the land that I will show you.'
zh: 對他說：‘你要離開本地本族，到我指示你的地方去。’

en: Then he went out from the land of the Chaldeans and lived in Haran. And after his father died, God removed him from there into this land in which you are now living.
zh: 他就離開迦勒底人的地方，住在哈蘭。他父親死後， 神又叫他從那裡遷到你們現在所住的地方。

en: Yet he gave him no inheritance in it, not even a foot's length, but promised to give it to him as a possession and to his offspring after him, though he had no child.
zh: 在這裡 神並沒有賜他產業，連立足之地也沒有。但 神應許把這地賜給他和他的後裔為業，雖然那時他還沒有兒子。

en: And God spoke to this effect- that his offspring would be sojourners in a land belonging to others, who would enslave them and afflict them four hundred years.
zh: 神就這樣說：‘你的後裔必在外地寄居，人要奴役、虐待他們四百年。’

en: 'But I will judge the nation that they serve,' said God, 'and after that they shall come out and worship me in this place.'
zh: 神又說：‘奴役他們的那個國家，我要親自懲罰。以後，他們要出來，在這地方事奉我。’

en: And he gave him the covenant of circumcision. And so Abraham became the father of Isaac, and circumcised him on the eighth day, and Isaac became the father of Jacob, and Jacob of the twelve patriarchs.
zh: 神也賜他割禮為約。這樣，亞伯拉罕生了以撒，第八天就給他行了割禮。後來，以撒生雅各，雅各生了十二位祖先。

en: "And the patriarchs, jealous of Joseph, sold him into Egypt; but God was with him
zh: “祖先妒忌約瑟，把他賣到埃及去，然而 神與他同在，

en: and rescued him out of all his afflictions and gave him favor and wisdom before Pharaoh, king of Egypt, who made him ruler over Egypt and over all his household.
zh: 救他脫離一切苦難，使他在埃及王法老面前，有智慧、得恩寵。法老立他為首相，管理埃及和法老的全家。

en: Now there came a famine throughout all Egypt and Canaan, and great affliction, and our fathers could find no food.
zh: 後來埃及和迦南全地遭遇饑荒、大災難，我們的祖先找不到糧食。

en: But when Jacob heard that there was grain in Egypt, he sent out our fathers on their first visit.
zh: 雅各聽見埃及有穀糧，就派我們的祖先去，這是第一次。

en: And on the second visit Joseph made himself known to his brothers, and Joseph's family became known to Pharaoh.
zh: 第二次的時候，約瑟就向哥哥們表露自己的身世，法老才知道約瑟的家世。

en: And Joseph sent and summoned Jacob his father and all his kindred, seventy-five persons in all.
zh: 約瑟就派人去把他父親雅各和全家七十五人都接來。

en: And Jacob went down into Egypt, and he died, he and our fathers,
zh: 於是雅各下了埃及。後來他和我們祖先都死了，

en: and they were carried back to Shechem and laid in the tomb that Abraham had bought for a sum of silver from the sons of Hamor in Shechem.
zh: 運到示劍，埋葬在亞伯拉罕用銀子向哈抹子孫買來的墳地裡。

en: "But as the time of the promise drew near, which God had granted to Abraham, the people increased and multiplied in Egypt
zh: “ 神給亞伯拉罕的應許快要實現的時候，以色列人在埃及人口繁盛增多；

en: until there arose over Egypt another king who did not know Joseph.
zh: 但是，到了另一位不認識約瑟的君王興起統治埃及的時候，

en: He dealt shrewdly with our race and forced our fathers to expose their infants, so that they would not be kept alive.
zh: 他就謀害我們的同胞，虐待我們的祖先，逼他們拋棄自己的嬰孩，不容嬰孩存活。

en: At this time Moses was born; and he was beautiful in God's sight. And he was brought up for three months in his father's house,
zh: 就在那時候，摩西出生了，他非常俊美，在父親的家中撫養了三個月。

en: and when he was exposed, Pharaoh's daughter adopted him and brought him up as her own son.
zh: 他被拋棄的時候，法老的女兒把他拾起來，當作兒子撫養。

en: And Moses was instructed in all the wisdom of the Egyptians, and he was mighty in his words and deeds.
zh: 摩西學盡了埃及人的一切學問，說話行事都有能力。

en: "When he was forty years old, it came into his heart to visit his brothers, the children of Israel.
zh: “到了四十歲，他心中起了一個念頭，要去看望自己的同胞以色列人。

en: And seeing one of them being wronged, he defended the oppressed man and avenged him by striking down the Egyptian.
zh: 當他看見有一個人受欺負，就去護衛，為那受屈的抱不平，打死了那個埃及人。

en: He supposed that his brothers would understand that God was giving them salvation by his hand, but they did not understand.
zh: 他以為同胞們都必知道 神要藉著他的手拯救他們，事實上他們卻不知道。

en: And on the following day he appeared to them as they were quarreling and tried to reconcile them, saying, 'Men, you are brothers. Why do you wrong each other?'
zh: 第二天，有人在打架，摩西就出面調解，說：‘你們是弟兄，為甚麼彼此欺負呢？’

en: But the man who was wronging his neighbor thrust him aside, saying, 'Who made you a ruler and a judge over us?
zh: 那欺負鄰舍的把他推開，說：‘誰立了你作我們的領袖和審判官呢？

en: Do you want to kill me as you killed the Egyptian yesterday?'
zh: 難道你想殺我，像昨天殺那個埃及人一樣嗎？’

en: At this retort Moses fled and became an exile in the land of Midian, where he became the father of two sons.
zh: 摩西因為這句話，就逃到米甸地寄居，在那裡生了兩個兒子。

en: "Now when forty years had passed, an angel appeared to him in the wilderness of Mount Sinai, in a flame of fire in a bush.
zh: “過了四十年，在西奈山的曠野，有一位使者，在荊棘中的火燄裡，向摩西顯現。

en: When Moses saw it, he was amazed at the sight, and as he drew near to look, there came the voice of the Lord:
zh: 他見了這個異象，十分驚奇；他正上前察看的時候，就有主的聲音說：

en: 'I am the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham and of Isaac and of Jacob.' And Moses trembled and did not dare to look.
zh: ‘我是你祖宗的 神，就是亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各的 神。’摩西戰戰兢兢，不敢觀看。

en: Then the Lord said to him, 'Take off the sandals from your feet, for the place where you are standing is holy ground.
zh: 主對他說：‘把你腳上的鞋脫掉，因為你所站的地方是聖地。

en: I have surely seen the affliction of my people who are in Egypt, and have heard their groaning, and I have come down to deliver them. And now come, I will send you to Egypt.'
zh: 我的子民在埃及所受的痛苦，我實在看見了；他們的歎息我也聽見了，我下來是要救他們。你來，我要派你到埃及去。’

en: "This Moses, whom they rejected, saying, 'Who made you a ruler and a judge?'- this man God sent as both ruler and redeemer by the hand of the angel who appeared to him in the bush.
zh: 他們拒絕了這位摩西，說：‘誰立了你作領袖和審判官呢？’但 神藉著在荊棘中向他顯現的使者的手，派他作領袖和救贖者。

en: This man led them out, performing wonders and signs in Egypt and at the Red Sea and in the wilderness for forty years.
zh: 這人領他們出來，並且在埃及地、紅海和曠野，行奇事神蹟四十年。

en: This is the Moses who said to the Israelites, 'God will raise up for you a prophet like me from your brothers.'
zh: 以前那位對以色列人說‘ 神要從你們弟兄中間，給你們興起一位先知像我’的，就是這摩西。

en: This is the one who was in the congregation in the wilderness with the angel who spoke to him at Mount Sinai, and with our fathers. He received living oracles to give to us.
zh: 那曾經在曠野的大會中，和那在西奈山上對他說話的使者同在，也與我們的祖先同在的，就是他。他領受了活的聖言，傳給我們。

en: Our fathers refused to obey him, but thrust him aside, and in their hearts they turned to Egypt,
zh: 我們的祖先不肯聽從他，反而把他推開，他們的心已經轉向了埃及，

en: saying to Aaron, 'Make for us gods who will go before us. As for this Moses who led us out from the land of Egypt, we do not know what has become of him.'
zh: 就對亞倫說：‘給我們做一些神像，可以走在我們前頭。因為把我們從埃及地領出來的那個摩西，我們不知道他遭遇了甚麼事。’

en: And they made a calf in those days, and offered a sacrifice to the idol and were rejoicing in the works of their hands.
zh: 在那些日子裡，他們做了一個牛犢，把祭物獻給那偶像，並且因自己手所做的而歡樂。

en: But God turned away and gave them over to worship the host of heaven, as it is written in the book of the prophets: "' Did you bring to me slain beasts and sacrifices, during the forty years in the wilderness, O house of Israel?
zh: 於是 神轉身離開，任憑他們事奉天象，正如先知書所說： ‘以色列家啊， 你們在曠野四十年， 豈是將祭牲和祭物獻給我呢？

en: You took up the tent of Moloch and the star of your god Rephan, the images that you made to worship; and I will send you into exile beyond Babylon.'
zh: 你們抬著摩洛的帳幕， 和理番神的星， 就是你們做來敬拜的像。 所以我要把你們放逐到巴比倫那一邊去。’

en: "Our fathers had the tent of witness in the wilderness, just as he who spoke to Moses directed him to make it, according to the pattern that he had seen.
zh: “我們的祖先在曠野有作證的帳幕，就是跟摩西談話的那位指示他，依照他看見的樣式做的。

en: Our fathers in turn brought it in with Joshua when they dispossessed the nations that God drove out before our fathers. So it was until the days of David,
zh: 我們的祖先相繼承受了這帳幕， 神把外族人從他們面前趕走以後，他們就同約書亞把帳幕帶進所得為業的地方，直到大衛的日子。

en: who found favor in the sight of God and asked to find a dwelling place for the God of Jacob.
zh: 大衛在 神面前蒙了恩，就求為雅各的 神找個居所，

en: But it was Solomon who built a house for him.
zh: 而由所羅門為他建造殿宇。

en: Yet the Most High does not dwell in houses made by hands, as the prophet says,
zh: 其實至高者並不住人手所造的，正如先知說：

en: "'Heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool. What kind of house will you build for me, says the Lord, or what is the place of my rest?
zh: ‘主說：天是我的寶座， 地是我的腳凳， 你們要為我建造怎樣的殿呢？ 哪裡是我安息的地方呢？

en: Did not my hand make all these things?'
zh: 這一切不都是我手所造的嗎？’

en: "You stiff-necked people, uncircumcised in heart and ears, you always resist the Holy Spirit. As your fathers did, so do you.
zh: “你們頸項剛硬、心和耳都未受割禮的人哪！你們時常抗拒聖靈，你們的祖先怎樣，你們也怎樣。

en: Which of the prophets did not your fathers persecute? And they killed those who announced beforehand the coming of the Righteous One, whom you have now betrayed and murdered,
zh: 有哪一個先知，你們的祖先不迫害呢？你們殺了那些預先宣告那義者要來的人，現在又把那義者出賣了，殺害了。

en: you who received the law as delivered by angels and did not keep it."
zh: 你們領受了由天使傳達的律法，卻不遵守。”

en: Now when they heard these things they were enraged, and they ground their teeth at him.
zh: 眾人聽了這些話，心中非常惱怒，就向著司提反咬牙切齒。

en: But he, full of the Holy Spirit, gazed into heaven and saw the glory of God, and Jesus standing at the right hand of God.
zh: 但司提反被聖靈充滿，定睛望著天，看見 神的榮耀，並且看見耶穌站在 神的右邊，

en: And he said, "Behold, I see the heavens opened, and the Son of Man standing at the right hand of God."
zh: 就說：“看哪！我看見天開了，人子站在 神的右邊。”

en: But they cried out with a loud voice and stopped their ears and rushed together at him.
zh: 眾人大聲喊叫，掩著耳朵，一齊向他衝過去，

en: Then they cast him out of the city and stoned him. And the witnesses laid down their garments at the feet of a young man named Saul.
zh: 把他推出城外，用石頭打他。那些證人把自己的衣服，放在一個名叫掃羅的青年人腳前。

en: And as they were stoning Stephen, he called out, "Lord Jesus, receive my spirit."
zh: 他們用石頭打司提反的時候，他呼求說：“主耶穌啊，求你接收我的靈魂！”

en: And falling to his knees he cried out with a loud voice, "Lord, do not hold this sin against them." And when he had said this, he fell asleep.
zh: 然後跪下來大聲喊著說：“主啊，不要把這罪歸給他們！”說了這話，就睡了。
